nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a residential property containing a single primary structure|A driveway connects the structure to the roadway and provides parking space adjacent to the building|The front portion of the property consists primarily of the driveway and landscaped lawn areas|A rectangular pool and adjacent patio area are visible behind the structure|A large tree occupies much of the rear yard|Solar panels are visible on a portion of the roof, along with several rooftop openings|A chimney is located near the rear of the structure|A narrow stone pathway extends along the western property boundary and terminates near a fenced area.

alpha.desc: The alpha view highlights the front of the structure|A covered entry area is visible near the front entrance and is set back from the front façade|A large gate is visible along the eastern side of the property near an adjacent structure|An attached vehicle storage area with front-facing doors is located near the center of the building|A paved walkway connects the driveway to the front entrance|Lawn areas occupy much of the western portion of the front yard, while the driveway occupies the eastern portion|A window is visible above the front entrance, and a rooftop opening is present above the vehicle storage area.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the eastern side of the property|Vegetation and tree cover partially obscure portions of the structure and rear yard|A patio area and a portion of the rectangular pool are visible behind the house, although the large tree in the backyard limits visibility of some features|A window is visible on the eastern side of the structure, with a storage container located nearby|A pathway constructed of pavers extends through a portion of the rear yard behind the house.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the rear of the property|A paved area surrounds the rectangular pool and extends toward the rear of the structure|A grass area bordered by pavers is visible adjacent to the pool|Outdoor tables with umbrellas are positioned near the house|Multiple windows and rooftop openings are visible on the rear-facing portions of the structure|An adjacent structure east of the main house contains a window and a covered area|A wood fence separates the property from the neighboring parcel to the south|A chimney extends from the rear portion of the house, with a landscaped bed surrounding its base|A large tree occupies much of the backyard, while another tree is located between the pool area and the adjacent structure.

delta.desc: The delta view highlights the western side of the property|Large solar panels cover a portion of the roof facing this direction|This perspective shows that much of the backyard beyond the pool and grassy area consists of paved surfaces|A door and window are visible on the side of the main structure.
